title: Shirish Chinchalkar
text: Home * People * Shirish Chinchalkar Shirish Chinchalkar [1] Shirish Chinchalkar , an Indian American mathematician, mechanical engineer, computer scientist, and senior analyst at Moody's Investors Service [2] . He holds a Ph.D. in mechanical engineering from Cornell University and an M.A. in mathematical finance from New York University , and gained experience in numerical and high-performance computing , and computational finance , where he applied Monte Carlo methods , numerical optimization , and parallel computing while teaching and researching at Indian Institute of Technology Bombay and Cornell University [3] . Contents 1 Number of Chess Positions 2 Selected Publications 3 External Links 4 References Number of Chess Positions [ edit ] In 1996, Shirish Chinchalkar determined 10^46.25 as upper bound for the number of reachable chess positions [4] . Selected Publications [ edit ] [5] Shirish Chinchalkar , Thomas F. Coleman ( 1995 ). Parallel structural optimization applied to bone remodeling on distributed memory machines . Coleman , Peter Mansfield ( 2005 ). Financial Computations on Clusters Using Web Services .
